webPush.title: Home Screen Push
webPush.description: After adding this app to your iPhone home screen, receive slot push alerts
webPush.statusReady: This device is subscribed for push notifications
webPush.statusNotReady: This device is not subscribed yet
webPush.unsupported: This browser does not support Web Push. On iPhone, use Safari and add the app to Home Screen.
webPush.hint: On iOS, add the site to Home Screen in Safari first, then allow notifications
webPush.steps: Open the site in Safari, add it to Home Screen, launch it from the Home Screen, allow notifications, then enable push on this device.

autoCheck.title: Background Auto-Crawl
